<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ use Symfony\Polyfill\Intl\Normalizer as p; if (\PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80000) { return require __DIR__.'/bootstrap80.php'; } if (!function_exists('normalizer_is_normalized')) { function normalizer_is_normalized($string, $form = p\Normalizer::FORM_C) { return p\Normalizer::isNormalized($string, $form); } } if (!function_exists('normalizer_normalize')) { function normalizer_normalize($string, $form = p\Normalizer::FORM_C) { return p\Normalizer::normalize($string, $form); } }
